websocket_client_context_t(3) Library Functions Manual websocket_client_context_t(3)

NAME

websocket_client_context_t - Context passed to client handler thread.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/websocket/server.h>

Data Fields


acip_transport_t * transport
ACIP transport for this client. char client_ip [64]
Client IP address (for logging/rate limiting). int client_port
Client port. void * user_data
User-provided data from server config.

Detailed Description

Context passed to client handler thread.

Contains all information needed to handle a WebSocket client connection.

Definition at line 81 of file include/ascii-chat/network/websocket/server.h.
